## Summary

What changed and why?

## Verification

Please list the commands you ran:

- [ ] Backend/data changes: `make test-backend`
- [ ] TUI changes: `cd tui && go test ./...`
- [ ] npm wrapper changes: `make npm-package-smoke && make npm-package-pack`
- [ ] Docs changes: checked links and examples

## Risk And Rollback

What could break, and how should maintainers roll this back if needed?

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
